info.arTaH: bIjasantAne garBADAne Cedane bIjatantusantAne muRqabIjoptyoH vapane GarzaRe tantunirmARe ca
info.hindI_arTa: bIja bonA bonA annAdi kAwanA keSa kAwanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: bIjasantAnaH = kzetre bIjavikiraRam  ayaM garBADAnepi dfSyate - ' mA vaH kzetre parabIjA (ni) nyavApsuH ' (A.pa.sU. 2.6.13.6) Cedanepi dfSyate  yaTA - ' keSAn vapati ' iti  ' bIjatantusantAne ' iti kAtantraH  da. u. vfttAvapi (9.39) evameva  ' Cedane ' iti kecit  ' muRqabIjoptyoH ' iti vopadevaH  ' nipUrvAt pitfkriyArTatA ' iti DA.kA.vyAKyA (2.24)  ' bIjatantusantAne vapane GarzaRe tantunirmARe ca ' iti kASakftsnaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'mihaH pra tamra avapat tamAMsi' (f॰10.73.5) prAvapat=prAsyat=prARudat=apAkarot=vyagamayat
'pravapARi vapurvahnO' (Bawwi॰20.36)
'pravapARi Siro BUmO vAnarasya vanacCidaH' (Bawwi॰9.98) CittvA pAtayAmIti jayamaNgalA
'saDanuH saSaraH sASvaH pravapan sAyakAn raRe' (BA॰BIzma॰52.67) pravapan=vikirana visfjan
'pravapan sAyakAn bahUn' (BA॰droRa॰147.46) ukto'rTaH
'parjanyaDozAn pravapan SarOGAn' (BA॰u॰22.11)
'ye niKAtA ye paroptAH' (aTarva॰18.2.34) paroptA dUre parityaktAH parAvapernizWAyAM rUpam parAvapiH parAsane vartate
'yASca te hasta izavaH parA tA Bagavo vapa' (vA॰saM॰16.9) parAvapa=parAkzipa
'parA vA eza yajYaM paSUn vapati yo'gnimudvAsayati' (tE॰saM॰1.5.2.1)
'yattvA krudDaH parovapa manyunA yadavartyA (agne)' (tE॰saM॰1.5.3.2) parovapa=parovApa uttame Rali vfdDivikalpaH
'parA vA ezo'gniM vapati yo'psu Basma praveSayati' (tE॰saM॰5.2.2.5) ukto'rTaH
SUrpeRa DAnyaM parAvapati utPAlya prakzipati paripavitukAmaH
'yattvA krudDaH parovapa manyunA yadavarttyA' (tE0 saM0 1531-2) parovapa udvAsitavAnasmi parApUrvasya vapate rliwyuttamEkavacane rUpam
'tAsAM sfzwAnAM parAvApAd abiBet …nAsya vittaM paropyate ya evaM veda' (jE0 brA0 1104) paropyate vikIryate naSyatIti yAvat parAvApaH parAsanam
'yAsAM tisraH paYcASato'BivlaNgErapAvapaH' (f॰1.133.4)
'yo varcinaH SatamindraH sahasramapAvapat' (f॰2.14.6) apAvapat=vyakirat=vyaGawayat apapUrvo vapirnASArTa iti tu sAyaRaH
'tenABiDAya dasyUnAM SakraH senAmapAvapat' (aTarva0 885) senAmapAvapat SatrubalaM parAsTat vyanInaSat
'so (kzurapaviH)'surAnapopya devAnaByAvartata' (jE0 brA0 1129) apopya parihftya
'pavitravati saMvapati' (Sa॰brA॰1.2.2.1) saMvapati=nikzipati Avapati pizwaM haviriti SezaH
'asaMvapantI pizARUni kurutAt' (Apa॰SrO॰1.6.21.7) asaMvapantI=sahavapanamakurvatI
'samopyAparaM KaraM pUrvasminnupavyUhati' (satyA0 SrO0 2462) samopya samAvApaM kftvA BAramADAya
'na tu DarmasannivApaH syAt' (Apa0 12820) ekasminDarme sahAnvayaH sannivApaH
'aTEnO saMnivapati' (Sa0 brA0 71168) sasamagninA saMyunakti
'nAnAgnInAM saMnivApaM varjayet' (Apa0 Da0 251210) saMnivApaH=samAveSanam
'ekANgabAhulyamanvAvApaH' (kO0 a0 10527) AyuDaviSezasyAyuDAntarAd BUyastvam anvAvApaH
'nirgA Upe yavamiva sTiviByaH' (f0 10683) nirUpe=niruptavAn=niveditavAn=arpitavAn
'AgnAvEzRavaM puroqASaM nirvapanti' (E0 brA0 11) ukto'rTaH

'na nirvapati paYcAnAmucCvasanna sa jIvati' (manu0 372) na nirvapati=na dadAti SrotriyAyAByAgatAya mahokzaM vA mahAjaM vA nirvapet (ajYAtamUlaM sUtrakAravacanam) - 'yastu sUktaM Bajate yasmE havirnirupyate'yameva sogniH' (ni0 718) nirupyata iti niH pUrvasya vapateH karmaRi lawi rUpam
'na ca tatsvayamaSnIyAd viDivadyanna nirvapet' (BA0 anu0 11185) ityatrEtatsaMvAdi vacaH SrUyate sarvAsUdAhftizu samAno DAtorarTaH
'yamAyAkampanaM tena niruvApa mahApaSum' (Bawwi0 1486) tena kAlenAkampanaM nAma rAkzasaM mahApaSurUpaM baliM hftavAnityarTaH
'nAhamaBAgo nirvapsyAmi' (tE0 brA0 3385) yAvadahamaBAgastizWAmi tAvad devatAdiByo havirAdIni na nivedayizyAmItyarTaH
'apasavyena hastena nirvapedudakaM Buvi' (manu0 3214) AsiYcet nikzipet
'pituScakAra tejasvI nirvApam BrAtfBiH saha' (rA0 210328) nirvApaM nivApam pitfdAnaM nivApaH syAdityamaraH
'nIlavEdUryavarRAMSca mfdUnyavasasaMcayAn nirvApArTaM paSUnAM te dadfSustatra sarvaSaH' (rA0 19179).. nirvApAya jagDyarTaM purato vikzepAya

'aTa havirAvapati' (Sa0 brA0 1147) Avapati prakzipati
'pAMsuBirAvapet' (va0 bf0 saM0 54120) AkiredityarTa:
'tvaM kalyARa vasu viSvamopize' (f0 1319) opize vikirasi saMkirasi

'SvaByaSca SvapaceByaSca vayoByaScAvaped Buvi' (manu0 3105) ukto'rTaH
'tasminnanyA devatA opyante' (ni0 125) opyante'ntarniveSyante samAveSyante

'aBojyaM buBukzamARaH pfTivImAvapet' (gO0 Da0 363) Avapet prakzipet
'keSAnAvapantI' (BA0 Adi0 3157) AvapantI prasADayantI
'lAjAnAvapantikA' (pA0 gf0 162) vikirantItyarTaH

'kintu pArAvatImenAM caYcvA caYcuzu taRqulAn AvapantIM svaSAvAnAmIkze putravatImiti' (bf0 Slo0 saM0 460).. AvapantIM nikzipantIm syAdAlavAlamAvAlamAvApa ityamare paryAyAH AvApaH saMmiSraRaM BavatyupayogArhatAM nIyamAne dravye dravyAntarasaMsargo vA

'tAn gfhItaSarAvApAn' (BA0 Adi0 18913)

'tantrAvApavidA' (SiSu0 288) AvApo viroDaBAvanA avaskandasaMkalpaH

'prAk svizwakfta AvApaH' (go0 gf0 1816) AvApaH=praDAnahomaH
'praBuragniH pratapane BUmirAvapane praBuH' (BA0 Adi0 8813) AvapanaM saNgrahaH

'pAnaM karavATa KAdaM nivapATa' (Sa0 brA0 134117) nivapatiriha dAne vartate

'saBAyA maDye'DidevanamudDatyAvekzyAkzAnnivapet' (Apa0 Da0 22520) nivapet=nikzipet niKanet

'yAvatyeva nivapsyansyAttAvadudDanyAt' (Sa0 brA0 131820) nivapsyat nivApaM cikIrzuH
